reasoning: Emotional (60%): The arrowhead nails the warm Hyrule palette — golden-yellow tip, orange-brown mid, white highlight — bright and charming with no grim tone. The star-shaped trail sparkles read as friendly and magical. However the trail body itself is a cool-toned dark brown rope, which pulls warmth down slightly relative to reference. Emotional score ~7/10. Technical (40%): Hard 1px pixel outlines are present on the arrowhead and sparkle shapes; 2-3 tone hard shading is evident (white/yellow/orange-brown) with no anti-aliasing or gradients detected at zoom. Pixels appear grid-snapped. Sparkle stars are simple 5px crosses — functional but minimal compared to Denzi reference level of detail. Technical score ~7/10. Weighted total: 0.6*7 + 0.4*7 = 7. Passes emotional axis, meets technical floor, but trail density and warmth of the trail body keep it marginal rather than a clear pass.
